title: pyrus albokermesina
intro: Pyrus albokermesina, also known as the Chinese white pear or white pear, is a species of plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits of relieving congestion and soothing the throat. Herbal preparations of Pyrus albokermesina include teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are often used to promote digestion and relieve gastrointestinal issues.
